tool_definitions.name: task_create
tool_definitions.description: Create a new task on the task board. Returns the created task.

tool_definitions.name: task_list
tool_definitions.description: List all tasks on the task board.

steps.message: Use the task_create tool to create a task with description "Review the README for typos". Then use the task_list tool to show all tasks.

tools.name: task_create

tools.name: task_list
tools.description: List all tasks on the task board.
